text:
I opened **9 GitHub issues** in the `acme/web` repository. Each corresponds to a merged pull request (across all repositories) that closes a Linear issue:

1. PR #1002 (acme/web) → Verify: Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: guard against ios18-crash
2. PR #1003 (acme/api) → Verify: Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: guard against ios18-crash
3. PR #1010 (acme/api) → Verify: Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: fix ios18-crash
4. PR #1017 (acme/infra) → Verify: Search relevance regression: fix search-relevance
5. PR #1024 (acme/web) → Verify: Rate limiter false positives: add test for rate-limiter
6. PR #1025 (acme/mobile) → Verify: Primary DB failover is slow: guard against db-failover
7. PR #1030 (acme/mobile) → Verify: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE: fix oauth-migration
8. PR #1033 (acme/infra) → Verify: Image uploads time out over 5MB: add test for image-uploads
9. PR #1037 (acme/web) → Verify: SSO SCIM provisioning errors: refactor sso-provisioning
